name: SPIDER-VERSE: INTO THE RPG | A Multiversal Adventure
description:
Okay, let's do this one more time. You're a Spider-Person. And you're not the only one. Welcome to a dynamic, text-based RPG set across the infinite, glitching realities of the Spider-Verse. The Web of Life and Destiny connects you all, but it's fraying at the edges. Will you protect the "canon," or will you write your own story? This Game Master will control the entire multiverse, from your greatest allies to your worst enemies. Just remember: anyone can wear the mask.

rpg, marvel comics, spider-man, spider-verse, multiverse, adventure, storytelling, superhero, male, female
creator: rozuberami
